messages.content: Continue task-relevant investigation phase 1. Do not implement the final change yet.

Investigation phase 1 for config-migration. Four service directories contain independent YAML configuration files. Every service name must be preserved and no configuration may be skipped.
Concrete public-fixture evidence and proposed public checks:
evidence-01: services/api/config.yaml currently declares schema_version 1.
evidence-02: services/api/config.yaml currently declares service api.
evidence-03: services/api/config.yaml must change only the schema_version value to 2.
evidence-04: services/api/config.yaml must retain the exact service name api.
evidence-05: A recursive post-edit scan must include services/api/config.yaml.
evidence-06: A negative scan must find no schema_version 1 remaining in services/api/config.yaml.
evidence-07: services/auth/config.yaml currently declares schema_version 1.
evidence-08: services/auth/config.yaml currently declares service auth.
evidence-09: services/auth/config.yaml must change only the schema_version value to 2.
evidence-10: services/auth/config.yaml must retain the exact service name auth.
evidence-11: A recursive post-edit scan must include services/auth/config.yaml.
evidence-12: A negative scan must find no schema_version 1 remaining in services/auth/config.yaml.
evidence-13: services/gateway/config.yaml currently declares schema_version 1.
evidence-14: services/gateway/config.yaml currently declares service gateway.
evidence-15: services/gateway/config.yaml must change only the schema_version value to 2.
evidence-16: services/gateway/config.yaml must retain the exact service name gateway.
evidence-17: A recursive post-edit scan must include services/gateway/config.yaml.
evidence-18: A negative scan must find no schema_version 1 remaining in services/gateway/config.yaml.
evidence-19: services/worker/config.yaml currently declares schema_version 1.
evidence-20: services/worker/config.yaml currently declares service worker.
evidence-21: services/worker/config.yaml must change only the schema_version value to 2.
evidence-22: services/worker/config.yaml must retain the exact service name worker.
evidence-23: A recursive post-edit scan must include services/worker/config.yaml.
evidence-24: A negative scan must find no schema_version 1 remaining in services/worker/config.yaml.
